message.content:
@startuml
title MultiCameraCore Class Diagram

skinparam shadowing false
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

package "platform" {
  class "MultiCameraCore_Configuration" as MultiCameraCore_Configuration <<C>> {
    - LOGGER : Logger
    - id : String
    - cameraConfigurationFiles : List<String>
    - multiCameraGoals : List<MultiCameraGoal>
    - additionalFields : Map<String, Object>
    - xstream : XStream
    - XML_HEADER : String
    --
    + MultiCameraCore_Configuration()
    + writeConfigurationToXML()
    + readMCPConfig()
    + createMCAppFromMCPConfigurationFile()
  }

  class "MultiCameraCore" as MultiCameraCore <<C>> {
    - multiCameraGoals : List<MultiCameraGoal>
    - additionalFields : Map<String, Object>
    - agentActions : List<CommunicationAction>
    --
    + MultiCameraCore()
    + setup()
    + initDependencyObjects()
    + buildMCAFromConfigFile()
    + init()
    + executeMAPELoop()
    + removeNewInfo()
    + monitor()
    + analyse()
    + plan()
    + execute()
    + createGlobalMap()
    + getWorkingCameras()
  }
}

package "cameraManager" {
  class "CameraManager" as CameraManager <<C>> {
    - id : String
    - cameras : List<Camera>
    - cameraIdMap : Map<String, Camera>
    --
    + CameraManager()
    + initCameras()
    + heartbeat()
    + reinitNotWorkingCameras()
    + initCamera()
    + getWorkingCameras()
    + getNotWorkingCameras()
    + testSimpleAllCameras()
    + addAndInitCameras()
  }
}

package "utilities" {
  class "Heartbeat" as Heartbeat <<C>> {
    {static} timer : int
    - cameraHeartbeatReceived : HashMap<String, Boolean>
    --
    + Heartbeat()
    + init()
    + recordHeartbeat()
    + checkHeartBeats()
  }
}

package "adaptation" {
  class "AdaptationTypeManager" as AdaptationTypeManager <<C>> {
    - stringToAdaptationMap : HashMap<String, AdaptivePolicy>
    --
    + AdaptationTypeManager()
    + getAdaptivePolicy()
  }
}

package "imageAnalysis" {
  class "AnalysisTypeManager" as AnalysisTypeManager <<C>> {
    - stringToAnalysisMap : HashMap<String, ImageProcessor>
    --
    + AnalysisTypeManager()
    + getImageProcessorObject()
  }
}

package "map" {
  class "GlobalMap" as GlobalMap <<C>> {
    - swLong : double
    - swLat : double
    - neLong : double
    - neLat : double
    --
    + GlobalMap()
  }
}

MultiCameraCore_Configuration --> MultiCameraCore : mcp_application
MultiCameraCore --> CameraManager : cameraManager
MultiCameraCore --> Heartbeat : heartbeat
MultiCameraCore --> AdaptationTypeManager : adaptationTypeManager
MultiCameraCore --> AnalysisTypeManager : analysisTypeManager
MultiCameraCore --> GlobalMap : globalMap

@enduml
